name: Chocolate Chip Banana Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Grease muffin cups.
2. Cream together butter and brown sugar until smooth.
3. Add beaten eggs and mashed bananas; mix well until combined.
4. In a separate bowl, sift flour with salt, baking soda, and baking powder.
5. Stir in the creamed mixture into the flour mixture just until moistened.
6. Gently fold in chopped nuts and chocolate chips.
7. Fill muffin cups 2/3 full.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Makes 20 muffins.
